examples: For the next fifteen years she sang and danced in both Broadway and vaudeville shows.
Vaudeville was a theatrical show with several entertainers performing songs, dances and jokes.
By nineteen-oh-seven she was part of a national vaudeville tour that performed across the country.
This witty and romantic ballet is made for lovers of big dancing and vaudeville.
"Carl uses his size to his advantage by winning people over with vaudeville-style jokes, " he says.
